titles: "같은 월급 80만 투자인데 30년 뒤 6.7억 차이" 박대리 vs 김주임 — ETF 로드맵의 모든 것
35살 박대리가 65살 10억 되는 법 — 6구간 포트폴리오 재조정 타임라인 완전 공개
복리의 비밀은 '가장 좋은 20일' — 30년 로드맵 없으면 수익 절반 사라진다

character_poses.1: INTRO-04 차트 가리키며 설명 — 박대리 10.5억 vs 김주임 3.8억 좌우 차트 대조
character_poses.2: INTRO-05 정면 응시 + 손짓 — 35→65 6단 황금 계단 로드맵 안내
character_poses.3: REACT-03 자신감/결론 — '가장 좋은 20일' 황금 별 컬렉션, 자신감 결론

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 차트 가리키며 설명(INTRO-04). 중앙 똑똑이가 양손으로 좌우 두 차트를 가리킴. 좌측에 가파르게 우상향하는 황금 차트(박대리 10.5억), 우측에 평탄하게 누운 회색 차트(김주임 3.8억). 두 차트 사이 황금 'VS' 구분선. 두 차트 위에 각각 작은 인물 실루엣. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, confident teacher presenter expression. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, full body shot, both paws extended outward — left paw pointing at the LEFT side, right paw pointing at the RIGHT side. On the LEFT side: a steeply upward-curving golden line chart soaring high, glowing brightly with warm gold light, with a small confident silhouette figure standing at the chart's peak. On the RIGHT side: a nearly flat dull gray chart with minimal growth, slightly drooping at the end, with a small slumped silhouette figure standing at its low end. A bold golden 'VS' divider separates the two sides. Left side bathed in warm gold success glow, right side in cool muted gray. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with clear success-vs-stagnation contrast.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 정면 응시 + 안내 손짓(INTRO-05). 좌측 똑똑이가 정면 보며 따뜻한 미소로 한 손 앞으로 안내. 우측에 6단 황금 계단이 우상향으로 펼쳐짐 — 각 계단에 35·40·45·50·55·60·65 숫자 배지. 맨 위에 빛나는 10억 황금 트로피. 계단 옆에 빛나는 우상향 곡선. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking directly at the viewer with a warm confident smile, small pink nose. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot, one paw extended forward in a welcoming presenter gesture inviting the viewer. On the RIGHT side: a grand six-tier golden marble staircase rising upward and to the right, each step embossed with a clear bold gold age-number badge in sequence — 35, 40, 45, 50, 55, 60, 65. At the top of the staircase, a brilliant glowing golden trophy radiating warm light beams. Beside the staircase, a softly rising golden line chart parallels the steps. Background: deep navy blue gradient sky with golden bokeh sparkles and a powerful warm radial glow at the trophy peak. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 자신감/결론(REACT-03). 좌측 똑똑이가 가슴 펴고 엄지 척, 자신감 있는 미소. 우측에 빛나는 황금 별 20개가 부채꼴 컬렉션으로 흩뿌려짐 — 그중 한 별이 빠지면 그 위로 빨간 X 표시. 별 무리 위로 우상향 황금 곡선이 지나감. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with confident sparkle, small pink nose, proud smile, one paw raised with thumb up, standing tall with chest out. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot. On the RIGHT side: a fan-shaped collection of twenty bright golden five-pointed stars scattered like a constellation, each star glowing with warm radiant light. One single star in the middle of the collection is dimmed and overlaid with a bold red X mark, suggesting a missed key day. A smooth upward-curving golden line chart soars across the upper portion above the star collection, indicating compounding growth. Background: deep navy blue gradient sky with golden bokeh sparkles and subtle radial glow behind the star cluster. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold star-cluster aesthetic.
